summary: Haunting, fantastic audience recording of an all‑time great show
review: The reviewer praises this Philly Crew audience tape as haunting and superb, even preferring it to his own soundboard disc.  They describe the concert as one of the best ever played, though no specific songs are called out.

ai_rating.rationale: The single detailed review is overwhelmingly positive about both performance and sound quality, suggesting a top‑tier show captured with excellent audience recording fidelity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the sound haunting, fantastic, and better than their own SBD, indicating very clear, well‑balanced audio despite being an audience source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific commentary on set structure; reviewer simply labels the concert as one of the best ever.
